FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Continued To Feb-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia for Paula Bibbs (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it is still looking for the first accounting. Ms. Navia stated that the only asset of the estate is a real property, that the date to close the sale is this week, that she hopes to have the petition filed by the end of February/first week of March and requested a continuance. Status on filing of the first account and report is continued to February 19, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that it needs to get done by then.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Nov-06-2018 Continued To Dec-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia for Paula Bibbs (Trustee).

Ms. Navia stated that the Settlor passed away, that there was a real property in trust that needed to be sold, that the sale went forward yesterday, that they should be able to close this and requested a 90-day continuance. The Court noted that it has been two years, that the first account should have been done in one year and that the account can not exceed two years absent good cause. Status on filing of the final account and report is continued to December 18, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (347 Orizaba Avenue San Francisco, Ca 94132)
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia for Paula Bibbs.

The sale was confirmed at $935,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed October 18, 2018. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of a revised order). The amount of the additional bond is to be determined by Counsel.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
